_meta.title: Microfinance sector statistics
_meta.source: MFIN Micrometer (primary); secondary news reporting MFIN releases (clearly marked)
_meta.summary: Microfinance portfolio and stress figures. Dec-2023 per-lender portfolio is from the saved primary MFIN Micrometer (48th issue); the Q4 FY26 headline is from secondary news and marked medium confidence pending the primary.
_meta.policy: Primary = MFIN Micrometer synopsis PDF saved under knowledge/sources/mfin/. Secondary (news) figures are recorded only with explicit source + confidence:medium + TODO_VERIFY against the primary. Never fabricate.
_meta.note: Scope caveat: the Dec-2023 'universe' (NBFC-MFIs + Banks + SFBs + NBFCs) and the Q4-FY26 'industry portfolio' headline may use different definitions and do not cleanly reconcile — do not merge them without confirming scope.

records.notes: YoY growth 26.6% (vs 1,23,386 Cr on 31-Dec-22). Peer share ~39%.
YoY growth 16.8% (vs 1,14,546 Cr on 31-Dec-22). Peer share ~33%.

records.metric: Micro-credit portfolio outstanding — Small Finance Banks
records.notes: YoY growth 35.0% (vs 52,192 Cr on 31-Dec-22). Peer share ~18%.
YoY growth 31.8% (vs 27,112 Cr on 31-Dec-22). Peer share ~9%.
